queue_intent: Stage 2 queue built from Stage 1 IR and repo truth at HEAD 6d4389af9f7575417c55123323930414b3c7b980

tasks.title: GATE.S4.CATALOG.GOODS.001: Starter goods content pack + schema validator v0

If evidence is missing or tests fail, escalate via DEFAULT.
